creator: dab@rj45.org
text:
The py-cherrypy-devel port needs to be removed from the ports tree, since py-cherrypy has been updated with the
newest version.  -devel was to support an RC release of the software which some software had a dependency on.  If removi
ng it isn't an option, I can submit a patch with IGNORE set, but that wouldn't seem (to me at least) to be the right sol
ution -- but let me know what I can do.

Fix: 

Remove py-cherrypy-devel from the ports tree, optionally mark IGNORE.
How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
